Legal Description: EXECUTIVE COMMERCE PARK LOT 4 BLDG B UNIT 101 PB 67 PG 89

Public Remarks: Class-A office suite in the prestigious Executive Commerce Park. 2,800 sq ft with private offices, conference room, kitchenette, and open workspace. Fiber internet available. Ample covered parking ratio. Close to Southwest Florida International Airport and major retail. Landlord TI allowance negotiable for qualified tenant.
Directions: From Colonial Blvd head south on US-41, right on Executive Dr. Suite 101 is in Building B on the right. Visitor parking in front.
